name: get_instructor
description: Retrieve profile details for a specific instructor on Coursera. Returns their full name, title, department, biography, photo, and the list of courses they teach.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the instructor.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include.

elements.title: Adjunct Professor
elements.bio: Andrew Ng is a globally recognized leader in AI...
